testTypesFound.name: Integration tests
testTypesFound.summary: The repository has integration tests for CLI and application workflows.

qualityGates.summary: The test command is available and passed when run.

behaviorProtected.name: CLI run workflow
behaviorProtected.summary: The CLI integration suite protects the user-visible run workflow.

behaviorNotProtected.name: Live external agent execution
behaviorNotProtected.summary: The visible tests use deterministic fake runners instead of a live Codex process.

testingRisks.name: External runner confidence
testingRisks.summary: Live AI runner behavior still needs explicit environment-backed validation before production use.

recommendations.summary: Keep adding behavior-level integration tests around new orchestration agents.

findings.claim: The repository protects CLI orchestration behavior with integration tests while live external runner validation remains a risk.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit live-runner validation before depending on external agent execution in production reports.
